title: How Many Miles to the Battlefield?
overview: On the colony of Side 6, 11-year-old Alfred Izuruha messes around in school with his friends during lunch. As Al walks home, he bumps into his old friend Christina MacKenzie, who had moved to Earth years before.

title: Reflections in a Brown Eye
overview: Al takes pictures of the damaged Zaku and sees the pilot pointing a gun at him.

title: And At the End of the Rainbow?
overview: Al holds on to Garcia's truck as it drives through the city.

title: Over the River and Through the Woods
overview: Al sneaks through the conduit back to Bernie and tells him he got pictures of a Federation mobile suit.

title: Say It Ain't So, Bernie!
overview: Killing is informed that Operation Rubicon has failed and that the Gundam is still in Side 6.

title: War In the Pocket
overview: Al and Bernie repair the damaged Zaku to fight the Alex Gundam.
